Off Calendar Jun-06-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendants Catalyst Resource Group, Inc. And Henry D. Fahman To Amend Answers To Complaint
Off Calendar May-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HENRY FAHMAN, CATALYST RESOURCE GROUP, INC.'s Motion By Defendants Catalyst Resource Group, Inc. And Henry D. Fahman To Amend Answers To Complaint.

Defendants' motion to amend answers to the complaint to state statute-of-limitations defenses is GRANTED. California has "a strong policy in favor of liberal allowance of amendments," and defendants make an adequate showing. (Mesler v. Bragg Mgmt. (1985) 39 Cal.3d 290, 296.) Motions to continue trial dates are heard in Department 206.

Order is signed,

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
